base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of character_select_icons — a ui from 1993 mortal kombat ii. 12 fighter portraits — Liu Kang/Kung Lao/Johnny Cage/Reptile/Sub-Zero/Scorpion/Kitana/Mileena/Jax/Raiden/Baraka/Shang Tsung. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 12 fighter portraits — Liu Kang/Kung Lao/Johnny Cage/Reptile/Sub-Zero/Scorpion/Kitana/Mileena/Jax/Raiden/Baraka/Shang Tsung
